case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MASSON, JEANNE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MASSON, JEANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASSON, JEANNE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,026.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MASSON, JEANNE
